mapper.select: SELECT store_id, manager_staff_id, address_id, last_update FROM store ORDER BY store_id

SELECT s.store_id, s.manager_staff_id, s.address_id, s.last_update, st.first_name AS manager_first_name, st.last_name AS manager_last_name FROM store s LEFT JOIN staff st ON s.manager_staff_id = st.staff_id WHERE s.store_id = #{storeId}

WITH monthly_sales AS ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', p.payment_date)::date AS month, s.store_id, SUM(p.amount) AS total_sales, COUNT(p.payment_id) AS transaction_count FROM payment p JOIN rental r ON p.rental_id = r.rental_id JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id JOIN store s ON i.store_id = s.store_id WHERE s.store_id = #{storeId} AND p.payment_date >= '2022-01-01' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', p.payment_date), s.store_id ) SELECT month, store_id, total_sales, transaction_count, LAG(total_sales) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_sales, CASE WHEN LAG(total_sales) OVER (ORDER BY month) IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND( (total_sales - LAG(total_sales) OVER (ORDER BY month)) / LAG(total_sales) OVER (ORDER BY month) * 100, 2) END AS growth_pct FROM monthly_sales ORDER BY month DESC
